hero.title: THE ULTIMATE STADIUM BURGER
hero.subtitle: Experience the roar of the crowd with our triple-stacked beef, melting cheddar, and signature stadium sauce. Limited time offer.

footer.about: Barracos Bar is the ultimate destination for sports fans. Enjoy the best food, ice-cold beers and an electric atmosphere designed to live every game as if you were in the stadium.

about.title: MORE THAN A
about.subtitle: Born from a passion for sports and the desire to create the ultimate sanctuary for true fans.
about.story1: Founded in 2024, Barracos Bar emerged as a project among friends who couldn't find a place with the right atmosphere to experience major sporting events. We wanted screens that made you feel like you were on the field, sound that gave you goosebumps, and food that matched the excitement.
about.story2: Today we are the city's reference meeting point. Every corner of our venue is designed with spectator comfort in mind, from acoustics to the strategic placement of our 15+ Ultra HD screens.
about.story3: At Barracos Bar we don't just serve food and drinks; we serve unforgettable moments, shared goal celebrations and the camaraderie that only sports can generate.
about.experienceSubtitle: We're not just a place to watch the game. We're the stadium outside the stadium.

sound.title: Immersive Sound
sound.desc: You'll feel every tackle, every shout, and every whistle as if you were in the stands.

gastronomy.title: Pro Gastronomy
gastronomy.desc: Our kitchen combines stadium classics with first-class gourmet ingredients.

community.title: Fan Community
community.desc: A vibrant atmosphere where rivalry is healthy and passion is shared.

aboutComponent.title: STADIUM
aboutComponent.subtitle: Step into the Barracos Bar experience. High-octane energy meets VIP sophistication in every corner of our arena.

reservationSteps.title: YOUR SEAT
reservationSteps.subtitle: The best stadium experience happens at Barracos Bar. Follow these steps to secure your spot for the most important play of the night.

step1.title: 1. ARRIVE AT THE STADIUM
step1.description: We're located in the heart of the sports district. We have ample secure parking for your convenience.

step2.title: 2. REQUEST YOUR TABLE
step2.description: Our host team will welcome you and assign you the best spot facing our giant screens.

step3.title: 3. LIVE THE PASSION
step3.description: Enjoy the best sports food and ice-cold beers while cheering for your favorite team live.

reservationSteps.address: Av. Principal de los Deportes, Edificio Barracos Bar
reservationSteps.hours: Open daily from 12:00 PM to 2:00 AM

review1.name: CARLOS 'THE BULL' R.
review1.text: The best atmosphere to watch the Champions! The {{businessName}} wings are out of this world.

review2.name: SOFÍA MÉNDEZ
review2.text: The service is super fast even when the bar is packed. Cheering a goal here is unique!

review1Es.name: CARLOS 'EL TORO' R.
review1Es.text: ¡La mejor atmósfera para ver la Champions! Las alitas con salsa {{businessName}} son de otro planeta.

review2Es.name: SOFÍA MÉNDEZ
review2Es.text: El servicio es rapidísimo incluso cuando el bar está a reventar. ¡Gritar un gol aquí es único!
